outlook_paragraph: Diamondback Energy shows strong satellite-derived drilling activity with 32 active sites at decision date, 7.2 above the recent trend, driven by 8 newly active pads. This upward momentum in the Permian—where the company has full exposure—supports continued production growth into Q1 2023. With WTI averaging near $76.50 and realized prices holding at a 7% discount, the deterministic revenue forecast is set at approximately $2.10B. The high share of continuously active sites (24 of 32) indicates sustained operational execution on core pads.
